strengths: Deep backend and distributed systems expertise, including event-driven architectures and microservices handling high-throughput requests.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) and frameworks supporting agentic workflows.
Prior exposure to the fintech sector and financial data processing through roles at RIDE Capital and Optilyz.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience, with no demonstrated history of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ people or managing external delivery partners.
AI agent experience appears limited to a recent six-month role, falling short of the deep, production-level multi-agent system requirements.
No track record of board-level communication, organizational design, or structuring senior technical-leadership layers at venture-backed scale-ups.
response.justification: While Bogdan possesses strong individual contributor skills in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and recent AI-agent tooling, his profile is fundamentally mismatched for an executive CTO role. He lacks the required 5+ years of senior technical leadership, experience scaling engineering organizations, and deep production history with complex multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes financial environments. He would be better suited for a Staff or Principal Engineer position rather than the C-suite.
